column1: # This file defines the reagent layout for spheroid media change protocols.
# Edit this file and upload with Ctrl+U in the GUI.
# The tube rack is a 24-tube rack with wells A1-A6
# Place your reagent tubes in the specified wells.
# Define which reagents (and volumes in µL) go into each well.
# Volumes are typically 1-10 µL per reagent.
#   - Well A1 gets 2µL of activin_a and 1µL of bmp4
